name: Maasai Treads Large Dog Bed-Dark Blue
shortDescription: Maasai Treads Small Dog Bed  features a sturdy, removable cushion with a Maasai Shuka design, ensuring both style and durability. Not only does this bed provide a cozy spot for your furry friend, but it also supports local artisans and promotes environmental sustainability. Diameter: 75cm
description: Elevate your pet’s comfort with the Maasai Treads Dog Bed, a blend of sustainable materials and traditional craftsmanship. Each bed is crafted from repurposed car tires, giving it a unique, eco-friendly edge. The bed features a sturdy, removable cushion with a Maasai Shuka design, ensuring both style and durability. Not only does this bed provide a cozy spot for your furry friend, but it also supports local artisans and promotes environmental sustainability. Features: Washable Maasai Print Cover: The vibrant Maasai print cover is not only eye-catching but also washable for easy maintenance. Removable Cushion: The bed includes a sturdy, removable cushion lined with a matching Maasai Shuka design, providing extra comfort and convenience. Zippered Cover: The cover features a zipper for easy removal and cleaning, ensuring your pet always has a fresh and hygienic place to rest. Eco-Friendly Materials: Crafted from old car tires, this bed is an environmentally responsible choice that reduces waste. Soft Sponge Lining: Lined with soft sponge, the bed offers a plush, comfortable surface for your pet to relax on. Benefits: Sustainable and Local: By choosing this bed, you support local craftsmanship and contribute to environmental preservation through the reuse of car tires. Easy Maintenance: The washable cover and removable cushion ensure effortless cleaning, so your pet always has a clean place to rest. Durable and Long-Lasting: The combination of repurposed tires and a sturdy cushion guarantees durability and resilience, even with regular use. Comfort and Style: Offers both a comfortable sleeping surface and a stylish, culturally rich design that complements any home decor. Buy Local, Build Local, and Help Save the Environment.
